steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
    python3 python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set workdir
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Create Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv .venv \
  && . .venv/bin/activate \
  && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin \
  && maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Default command
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore git history and caches
.git
.gitignore
__pycache__
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
build
dist
*.egg-info
venv
.Venv
.env
*.log
node_modules
target
crates/target
docs/build
"}

Build error:
Summary of Docker build error

- Exact error message and exit code:
The virtual environment was not created successfully because ensurepip is not
 On Debian/Ubuntu systems, you need to install the python3-venv
 package using the following command.
 
     apt install python3.10-venv

 package, recreate your virtual environment.
 
 Failing command: /workspace/.venv/bin/python3

Exit code: 1

- Failing command/step:
Dockerfile step [6/6] RUN python3 -m venv .venv   && . .venv/bin/activate   && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin   && maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

- Missing packages or files mentioned:
- python3.10-venv (recommended); general note: python3-venv also relevant
- The error indicates ensurepip is not available because the venv creation failed due to the missing venv package.

- Version mismatch / environment details:
- Base image uses Ubuntu (jammy family) and later proceeds to install Python 3.10 components.
- The error explicitly points to missing python3.10-venv (apt install python3.10-venv) as the fix, not a code or toolchain mismatch.
- No other explicit version mismatch noted in the error block; the issue is missing venv package preventing ensurepip-based venv creation. 

Recommended fix:
Add installation of the Python venv package in the image (e.g., apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3.10-venv or python3-venv) before creating the virtual environment, then re-run the build.
steps.tool_output:
- Build status: build_failed

- Concern: The venv created in RUN is not activated by default; Python modules installed into the venv won’t be available to the system Python unless PATH is updated or the venv is activated at startup. If runtime expects polars/imports without activating a venv, install into system Python or expose/activate the venv at runtime.

- Build error:
  - Message: The virtual environment was not created successfully because ensurepip is not available.
  - On Debian/Ubuntu: install python3-venv package.
  - Command to fix (example): apt install python3.10-venv (may require sudo); after installing, recreate the virtual environment.

- Failing command/step:
  - Dockerfile step [6/6] RUN python3 -m venv .venv   && . .venv/bin/activate   && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin   && maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml
  - Failing command path: /workspace/.venv/bin/python3

- Missing packages or files:
  - python3.10-venv (recommended)
  - python3-venv (also relevant)

- Version/environment details:
  - Base image uses Ubuntu (jammy) and attempts to install Python 3.10 components.
  - Error explicitly points to missing python3.10-venv as the fix, not a code mismatch.
  - Cause: ensurepip unavailable because venv creation failed due to missing venv package.

- Recommended fix:
  - Add installation of the Python venv package in the image before creating the virtual environment, e.g.:
    - apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3.10-venv
    - (or) apt-get install -y python3-venv
  - Then re-run the build.

- Runtime note:
  - If you expect imports without activating the venv, consider installing into system Python or exposing the venv’s bin/python via PATH or activating it in CMD.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
    python3-venv python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set workdir
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Create Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/python -m ensurepip \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Expose the venv by default
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

# Default command
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Polars Python bindings in a builder stage, then package the virtualenv into the final image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies for building Rust/Python extensions
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
    python3-venv python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Create Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/python -m ensurepip \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Also expose the Python environment for final image
# The final image will simply copy this virtualenv

FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as runtime

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install minimal runtime dependencies (Python is provided by the venv we copy)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built virtualenv from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /workspace/.venv

# Ensure the final image uses the venv by default
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Polars Python bindings in a builder stage, then package the virtualenv into the final image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies for building Rust/Python extensions
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
    python3-venv python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Create Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/python -m ensurepip \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Also expose the Python environment for final image
# The final image will simply copy this virtualenv

FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as runtime

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install minimal runtime dependencies (Python is provided by the venv we copy)
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    libssl3 zlib1g libbz2-1.0 liblz4-1 libzstd1 libffi7 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built virtualenv from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /workspace/.venv

# Ensure the final image uses the venv by default
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Polars Python bindings in a builder stage, then package the virtualenv into the final image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies for building Rust/Python extensions
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
    python3-venv python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set workdir and copy source
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Create Python virtual environment and install dependencies, then build runtime
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/python -m ensurepip \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/pip install --no-build-isolation --no-deps -e ./py-polars \
  && /workspace/.venv/bin/maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 as runtime

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install essential runtime libraries for Python extensions
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    libssl3 zlib1g libbz2-1.0 liblz4-1 libzstd1 libffi7 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the built virtualenv from the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /workspace/.venv

# Ensure the final image uses the venv by default
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Unactivated virtual environment**  
   - *What happened:* Initial builds created a Python venv in `RUN` but never added it to `PATH`, so installed Python packages (including `polars`) were not found by the system Python.  
   - *Fix:* After creating the venv (`python3 -m venv /opt/venv`), add `ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"` before installing Python packages or running `maturin`.

2. **Running everything as root**  
   - *What happened:* All `RUN` commands executed as root. This isn’t a direct build failure but causes permission and security risks when running containers.  
   - *Fix:* Add a non‑root user near the end of the final stage:  
     ```dockerfile
     RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
     USER appuser
     ```

3. **Base image ambiguity (`ubuntu:jammy-20260217`)**  
   - *What happened:* Multiple checks flagged concern that this tag might not be available, even though the search later confirmed it exists.  
   - *Fix:* Use a stable, public tag like `ubuntu:22.04` unless that specific dated tag is required and verified; this ensures reproducibility.

4. **Repository‑dependent build path for maturin**  
   - *What happened:* `maturin -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml` assumed that exact layout, which may not exist in all contexts.  
   - *Fix:* Verify or make the path relative to `WORKDIR` explicitly:  
     ```dockerfile
     WORKDIR /app
     COPY py-polars/ ./py-polars/
     RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml --release
     ```

5. **Missing runtime system libraries**  
   - *What happened:* The runtime image only had `ca-certificates`. Imports failed because compiled `polars` extensions likely need shared libraries like `libzstd1`, `liblz4-1`, `libssl3`, `libc6`.  
   - *Fix:* Add these in the final image:  
     ```dockerfile
     RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
         libzstd1 liblz4-1 libssl3 liblzma5 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
     ```

6. **Copying a full venv between stages without compatibility guarantees**  
   - *What happened:* The builder and final images were both `ubuntu`, but no guarantee the ABI or paths matched; this can break Python native modules.  
   - *Fix:* Ensure same base image for builder and final or rebuild wheels in final stage from `maturin` artifacts only (copy `.whl` files and `pip install` them).

7. **Smoke test syntax error**  
   - *What happened:* The check line `python -c "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)` missed the closing quote.  
   - *Fix:* Use a valid command:  
     ```bash
     python -c "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)"
     ```

8. **Final validation step missing importable `polars`**  
   - *What happened:* Even when build passed, `import polars` failed—indicating the Python wheel wasn’t correctly installed in the runtime venv.  
   - *Fix:* Explicitly `pip install /path/to/wheel/*.whl` in runtime image within the activated venv before testing.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Install maturin (and Python build tooling)
RUN pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin

# Copy source and build Polars Python bindings for 32-bit runtime
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bring in the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
USER appuser

WORKDIR /workspace

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.pyo
build/
dist/
*.egg-info/
!.git
**/.git/
.crate/
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-dev python3-pip curl git ca-certificates \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Install maturin (and Python build tooling)
RUN pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin

# Copy source and build Polars Python bindings for 64-bit runtime
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bring in the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
USER appuser

WORKDIR /workspace

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-dev python3-venv python3-pip ca-certificates curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Install maturin (and Python build tooling)
RUN pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin

# Copy source and build Polars Python bindings for 32-bit runtime
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bring in the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
USER appuser

WORKDIR /workspace

# Smoke test script to verify import
RUN echo 'import polars as pl; print("polars_version=" + pl.__version__)' > /workspace/test_smoke.py

CMD ["/opt/venv/bin/python", "/workspace/test_smoke.py"]
"}

steps.tool_output_raw:
VerifyBuild status: rejected
Concerns: The build target is a 32-bit Polars runtime (polars-runtime-32) but the final image uses a 64-bit Python interpreter and libraries. Without enabling 32-bit multiarch support or building a 64-bit variant, the produced extension is unlikely to load correctly in the final image (ELF class mismatch or missing i386 libraries). This risks runtime failure when importing polars.

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Install maturin (and Python build tooling)
RUN pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin

# Copy source and build Polars Python bindings for 64-bit runtime
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bring in the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:$PATH"

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
USER appuser

WORKDIR /workspace

# Smoke test script to verify import
RUN echo 'import polars as pl; print("polars_version=" + pl.__version__)' > /workspace/test_smoke.py

CMD ["python", "/workspace/test_smoke.py"]
"}

  - Ensure there is an active virtualenv named .venv in the current or a parent directory, or export/activate an existing one (or set VIRTUAL_ENV). Alternatively, run maturin build (not maturin develop) and install the resulting wheel.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-dev python3-venv python3-pip ca-certificates curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:${PATH}"

# Install maturin (and Python build tooling)
RUN /bin/bash -lc "source /opt/venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin"

# Copy source and build Polars Python bindings for 32-bit runtime
WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Bring in the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:${PATH}"

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
USER appuser

WORKDIR /workspace

# Smoke test script to verify import
RUN echo 'import polars as pl; print("polars_version=" + pl.__version__)' > /workspace/test_smoke.py

CMD ["python", "/workspace/test_smoke.py"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-dev python3-pip ca-certificates curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"

# Install maturin (build tool)
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin

WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Build the 64-bit Polars Python runtime wheel
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --release

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy wheel from builder and install
COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/wheels/*.whl /wheels/
RUN python3 -m pip install /wheels/*.whl

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /usr/local/lib/python3*/site-packages
USER appuser
WORKDIR /workspace

CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y

ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/venv

WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Build 64-bit runtime wheel
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --release"

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:20.04 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \

 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN useradd -m appuser
USER appuser
WORKDIR /workspace

CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:22.04 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-venv python3-pip ca-certificates curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:${PATH}"

# Install maturin (build tool) inside the venv
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin"

WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Build the 32-bit Polars Python runtime wheel
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml --release"

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:22.04 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the built wheel from builder and install into a fresh environment
COPY --from=builder /workspace/py-polars/target/wheels/*.whl /wheels/
RUN python3 -m pip install /wheels/*.whl

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /usr/local/lib/python3*/site-packages
USER appuser
WORKDIR /workspace

# Smoke test: verify polars import and version
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:22.04 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-venv python3-pip ca-certificates curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:${PATH}"

# Install maturin (build tool) inside the venv
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin"

WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Build the 64-bit Polars Python runtime wheel
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --uv"

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:22.04 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the built venv from builder
COPY --from=builder /opt/venv /opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:${PATH}"

RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /opt/venv
USER appuser
WORKDIR /workspace

CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:22.04 AS builder
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev python3-venv python3-pip ca-certificates curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:${PATH}"

# Set up Python virtual environment inside the builder
RUN python3 -m venv /opt/venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/venv
ENV PATH="/opt/venv/bin:${PATH}"

# Install maturin (build tool) inside the venv
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin"

WORKDIR /workspace
COPY . .

# Build the 64-bit Polars Python runtime wheel
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /opt/venv/bin/activate && maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --release" 

# Final runtime image
FROM ubuntu:22.04 AS final
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  python3 python3-pip ca-certificates \
  libssl3 libzstd1 liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 liblzma5 zlib1g \
  curl git \
 && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the built wheel from builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/py-polars/target/wheels/*.whl /wheels/
RUN python3 -m pip install /wheels/*.whl

# Smoke test
RUN python3 -c "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)"

# Create a non-root user for running the container
RUN useradd -m appuser && chown -R appuser /usr/local/lib/python3*/site-packages
USER appuser
WORKDIR /workspace

CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars_version=' + pl.__version__)" ]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Base image mismatch and architecture issues**  
   - Tried: Built a 32‑bit Polars runtime (`polars-runtime-32`) on a 64‑bit Ubuntu base (`ubuntu:jammy‑20260217`, `ubuntu:22.04`).  
   - Failed: maturin could not build due to missing 32‑bit toolchains; later smoke tests confirmed architecture mismatch (Python 64‑bit vs runtime 32‑bit).  
   - Do differently: Build and ship a consistent 64‑bit runtime (`polars-runtime-64` only). If 32‑bit is required, install `gcc‑multilib` and matching 32‑bit libs explicitly, or switch to a 32‑bit base image.

2. **Rust toolchain and maturin not pinned or installed correctly**  
   - Tried: Installed maturin via apt or pip without specifying versions. Errors showed maturin failed during `RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml`.  
   - Failed: Unspecified toolchain caused reproducibility and missing‑component issues.  
   - Do differently: Explicitly install a pinned Rust toolchain (e.g., `rustup toolchain install 1.75.0 && rustup default 1.75.0`) and a fixed maturin version (`pip install maturin==1.4.0`).

3. **Incorrect wheel copy paths**  
   - Tried: `COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/wheels/*.whl /wheels/` and similar globs.  
   - Failed: Docker COPY does not expand glob patterns; maturin output wheels under crate‑specific paths (`.../py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/target/wheels`).  
   - Do differently: Use exact copy path, e.g.  
     ```
     COPY --from=builder /workspace/py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/target/wheels /wheels
     ```  
     or use `find`/`mv` inside builder to move wheel to a known location before copying.

4. **Package availability mismatch**  
   - Tried: `FROM ubuntu:20.04` with `apt-get install libssl3`, `python3-venv`, etc.  
   - Failed: `E: Unable to locate package libssl3` — this package exists only in Ubuntu ≥22.04.  
   - Do differently: Either use `ubuntu:22.04`+`libssl3`, or for older bases install `libssl1.1`. Keep package list consistent with chosen base.

5. **Excessive or fragile cross‑stage copies**  
   - Tried: Copying Python virtual environments and wheel directories between stages.  
   - Failed: Incompatible Python paths and library ABI differences across stages/distributions.  
   - Do differently: Recreate venv in final stage (`python -m venv /venv && pip install /wheels/*.whl`), only copy built wheel artifacts—not environments.

6. **Build context and reproducibility**  
   - Tried: Missing `.dockerignore` early on; large context slowed builds.  
   - Fixed later by adding `.dockerignore`.  
   - Do differently: Keep `.dockerignore` as is; limit context to required source dirs. Pin all versions for reproducible builds.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

# Non-interactive frontend for apt
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies required to build Polars from source
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
        python3-dev python3-pip curl ca-certificates git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain (pinned) so we can build the PyPolars Rust bindings
ENV RUSTUP_HOME=/root/.rustup
ENV CARGO_HOME=/root/.cargo
ENV PATH=/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y \
    && rustup toolchain install 1.75.0 \
    && rustup default 1.75.0

# Work from repository root
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source into the image
COPY . /workspace

# Build Polars Python bindings via maturin for the 32-bit runtime
# Steps: create a Python venv, install maturin (pinned), and build with maturin develop
RUN /bin/bash -lc 'set -e; \
    python3 -m venv .venv; \
    source .venv/bin/activate; \
    python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin==1.4.0; \
    maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml'

# Default to an interactive shell for convenience
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore version control and build artefacts
.git
.gitignore
__pycache__/
*.pyc
*.log
build/
dist/
target/
.node_modules/
__pycache__/
*.egg-info/
*.egg
*.venv/
venv/
.env
.idea/
.DS_Store
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM ubuntu:jammy-20260217

# Non-interactive frontend for apt
ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies required to build Polars from source
RUN apt-get update \
    && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
        build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev libzstd-dev \
        python3-dev python3-pip python3-venv curl ca-certificates git \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Rust toolchain (pinned) so we can build the PyPolars Rust bindings
ENV RUSTUP_HOME=/root/.rustup
ENV CARGO_HOME=/root/.cargo
ENV PATH=/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH
RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y \
    && rustup toolchain install 1.75.0 \
    && rustup default 1.75.0

# Work from repository root
WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy source into the image
COPY . /workspace

# Build Polars Python bindings via maturin for the 32-bit runtime
# Steps: create a Python venv, install maturin (pinned), and build with maturin develop
RUN /bin/bash -lc 'set -e; \
    python3 -m venv .venv; \
    source .venv/bin/activate; \
    python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel maturin==1.4.0; \
    maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml'

# Default to an interactive shell for convenience
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build for Polars with Python bindings

# Stage 1: Build Polars and Python bindings
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required build tools and Python runtime
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the repository
COPY . .

# Build all Rust crates in workspace (with locked Cargo.lock)
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Set up Python virtual environment and maturin
RUN python3 -m venv .venv
RUN .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip
RUN .venv/bin/pip install maturin

# Build and install the Python Polars bindings for the 32-bit runtime (as per blueprint)
RUN .venv/bin/maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM debian:bookworm-slim AS runtime

# Install runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g libbz2-1.0 liblz4-1 python3 python3-pip \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the Python venv from the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /venv

# Ensure the venv is used by default
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/venv
ENV PATH="/venv/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

# Default to an interactive shell. Users can run Python directly (e.g., `python -c 'import polars'`).
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore VCS and common build artifacts
.git
.gitignore
node_modules
target
.bin
*.pyc
__pycache__
.dist-info
build
.env
venv
venv/**
.DS_Store
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Rust + Python bindings, package as wheel, and provide a runtime image

# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and Polars Python bindings, produce a wheel for 64-bit runtime
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Build Rust workspace
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 64-bit runtime
# Note: py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64 exists in the repo
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Collect the built wheel for the runtime
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test: import polars and print version
CMD ["bash", "-lc", "python - <<'PY'
import polars as pl
print('polars version:', pl.__version__)
print('Python:', __import__('sys').version)
PY" ]
"}

{"path": ".dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore VCS and common build artifacts
.git
.gitignore
node_modules
target
.bin
*.pyc
__pycache__
.dist-info
build
.env
venv
venv/**
.DS_Store
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Rust + Python bindings, package as wheel, and provide a runtime image

# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and Polars Python bindings, produce a wheel for 64-bit runtime
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Build Rust workspace
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 64-bit runtime
# Note: py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64 exists in the repo
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Collect the built wheel for the runtime
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Rust + Python bindings, package as wheel, and provide a runtime image

# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and Polars Python bindings, produce a wheel for 32-bit runtime
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Build Rust workspace
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 32-bit runtime
# Note: py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32 exists in the repo
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Expose the built venv for the runtime
RUN echo 'Polars build complete in /workspace/.venv'

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the built virtual environment from the builder (32-bit runtime)
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /venv

# Ensure the venv is used by default
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/venv
ENV PATH="/venv/bin:${PATH}"

WORKDIR /app

# Smoke test: run a quick import of polars
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars version:', pl.__version__); import sys; print('Python:', sys.version)" ]
"}

steps.tool_output_raw:
VerifyBuild status: rejected
Concerns: The Dockerfile attempts to build a 32-bit Python binding inside a 64-bit final runtime image; a 32-bit extension cannot be loaded by 64-bit Python, so the final container will fail to import polars., Stage 1 uses maturin to 'develop' but does not create or preserve a Python virtual environment at /workspace/.venv; Stage 2 blindly copies /workspace/.venv which likely does not exist, causing the build to fail., There is no explicit creation of a Python virtual environment; The final runtime expects /venv, but the wheel or package is installed into a system Python in Stage 1, not into /venv; provenance of polars in the final image is unclear., COPY . . copies the entire repository; this can bloat the build context and may inadvertently copy unnecessary files; best practice is to copy only what is needed for the build., The 32-bit runtime approach on a 64-bit host is likely unsupported or unstable; typical Polars Python wheels are built for the target Python runtime (matching the final image), so this strategy should be reconsidered.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Rust crates and Python bindings, then provide a runtime image

FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy lockfile and manifest to leverage cargo's caching
COPY Cargo.lock Cargo.toml ./

# Update dependencies (locked)
RUN cargo update --locked

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build only the polars crate first to speed up the verify process
RUN cargo build -p polars --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 64-bit runtime
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Expose built wheel location
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test to verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars version:', pl.__version__)" ]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Rust crates and Python bindings, then provide a runtime image

# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and Python bindings, producing a wheel for the 64-bit runtime
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Build Rust workspace (with locked dependencies)
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 64-bit runtime
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Expose built wheel location
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test: verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars version:', pl.__version__)" ]
"}

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \

RUN cargo update --workspace --locked

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

RUN cargo build -p polars --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 32-bit runtime
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Expose built wheel location
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test: verify import

"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Polars Rust crates and Python bindings, then provide a minimal runtime image

# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and Python bindings, producing a wheel for the Python runtime
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the repository
COPY . .

# Build the Rust workspace (locked dependencies)
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 32-bit runtime (as per blueprint)
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Expose the built wheel location
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Minimal runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test: verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars version:', pl.__version__)" ]
"}

# Copy repository

# Build Rust workspace (locked); this should cache well

RUN cargo build -p polars --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test: verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars version:', pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multi-stage build: build Rust polars crates and Python bindings, then provide a minimal runtime image

# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and Python bindings, producing a wheel for the 64-bit runtime
FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install build dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy full repository for build
COPY . .

# Build Rust workspace (locked); this should cache well
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build -p polars --locked

# Install maturin to build Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build Python bindings wheel for the 64-bit runtime
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Expose built wheel location
RUN mkdir -p /wheel
RUN cp target/wheels/*.whl /wheel/ 2>/dev/null || true

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  ca-certificates libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 libbz2-1.0 \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the built wheel from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install polars Python wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-cache-dir /wheel/*.whl

# Smoke test: verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print('polars version:', pl.__version__)" ]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Nonexistent base image tag**  
   - Tried: `FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie`  
   - Failed because `rust:1.94.0-trixie` doesn’t exist on Docker Hub.  
   - **Fix:** Use a valid tag such as `rust:1.74-bullseye` or `rust:1.74-slim` (check `docker pull rust` tags first).

2. **Architecture mismatch (32‑bit vs 64‑bit)**  
   - Tried to build a 32‑bit Polars Python wheel, then copy it into a 64‑bit runtime (`python:3.12-slim`).  
   - The wheel couldn’t be loaded because architectures differ.  
   - **Fix:** Ensure both builder and runtime are amd64, or both i386. Prefer amd64 throughout. Use consistent base images (`FROM rust:…` and `FROM python:3.12-slim`).

3. **Python ABI mismatch**  
   - The maturin‑built wheel used a Python version different from the runtime’s (`3.x` → `3.12`), producing incompatible ABI tags.  
   - **Fix:** Install the same Python version in the builder (e.g., `apt-get install python3.12 python3.12-dev`) or use a `python:3.12` base for both build and runtime.

4. **Missing or incorrect wheel artifact**  
   - The final stage ran `pip install /wheel/*.whl`, but no wheel existed if `maturin build` failed.  
   - **Fix:** Verify the build target path (`cd py-polars` or wherever `Cargo.toml` lives). Add an explicit check: `RUN test -f /wheel/*.whl`.

5. **Sources not copied**  
   - Some steps only copied `Cargo.toml` and `Cargo.lock`; `cargo build` failed because `src/` wasn’t present.  
   - **Fix:** Copy the entire crate source (`COPY . .`) after adding proper `.dockerignore` to avoid large context.

6. **Missing dependencies for building Python bindings**  
   - `maturin` or `pip install maturin` was used without required system dependencies (e.g., `libssl-dev`, `pkg-config`, `python3-dev`).  
   - **Fix:** Before building, `apt-get install -y build-essential pkg-config libssl-dev python3-dev maturin`.

7. **Improper use of COPY and wheel path**  
   - Used `COPY /wheel /wheel` or glob patterns that didn’t match actual output folder.  
   - **Fix:** Use consistent `maturin build --release --out /wheel` and then `COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel` in the final stage.

8. **Overly large build context**  
   - `COPY . .` included git and virtualenv contents.  
   - **Fix:** Keep `.dockerignore` with `.git`, `target`, `venv`, etc. confirmed.

9. **Missing explicit build target**  
   - Cargo might default to wrong crate when repo has multiple crates.  
   - **Fix:** Specify subcrate path: `WORKDIR /app/py-polars` (or correct path) before calling `maturin build`.

10. **Final runtime too minimal for built wheel**  
    - `python:3.12-slim` might miss runtime shared libraries (e.g., `libssl` or `libblas`).  
    - **Fix:** Check `ldd` on built .so; install matching libs in runtime (`libssl3`, `libxml2`, etc.).

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multistage Dockerfile to build Polars Python bindings from source

# Stage 1: Builder - compile Rust crates and Python bindings
FROM --platform=$TARGETPLATFORM rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required build tools and Python tooling
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository
COPY . .

# Prebuild crates to leverage cargo caching
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Build Python bindings (32-bit Polars runtime) into /wheel
RUN python3 -m venv .venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && maturin build -m runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheel --release"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM --platform=$TARGETPLATFORM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python3 -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Default command
CMD ["python3"]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multistage Dockerfile to build Polars Python bindings from source
FROM rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required build tools and Python tooling
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy repository manifests first to leverage Docker cache for dependencies
COPY Cargo.toml Cargo.lock ./

# Pre-download dependencies
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked

# Now copy the rest of the repo
COPY . .

# Build the Rust workspace (may take time, but cached in subsequent builds)
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Build Python bindings (64-bit Polars runtime) into /wheel
RUN python3 -m venv .venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && maturin build -m runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheel --release"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Default command: ensure Polars can be imported quickly
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Default command: ensure Polars can be imported quickly
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multistage Dockerfile to build Polars Python bindings from source
FROM rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required build tools and Python tooling
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Pre-copy the Cargo manifests to leverage Docker cache for dependencies
COPY Cargo.lock Cargo.toml ./

# Download dependencies
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked

# Now copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the Rust workspace (may take a while, but caches on subsequent builds)
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Create a Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

# Build and install the Python bindings into the virtualenv (32-bit Polars runtime)
RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && maturin develop -m runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl3 zlib1g liblz4-1 ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the Python virtual environment built in the builder
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /opt/polars-venv

ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/polars-venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"

# Basic test to ensure polars is importable
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

If the final image is 64-bit, ensure the 32-bit runtime is actually compatible with a 64-bit Python process; otherwise switch to the correct 64-bit runtime variant.

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multistage Dockerfile to build Polars Python bindings from source
FROM --platform=linux/amd64 rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required build tools and Python tooling
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifests first to leverage Docker cache
COPY Cargo.lock Cargo.toml ./

# Download dependencies
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked

# Now copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the Rust workspace (may take a while; caching helps in subsequent builds)
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Create a Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

# Build the Python bindings for the 64-bit Polars runtime into /wheel
RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && maturin build -m runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheel --release"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies that are commonly needed by Python wheels
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl1.1 zlib1g liblz4-1 ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Default command to verify import
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Multistage Dockerfile to build Polars Python bindings from source
FROM rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install required build tools and Python tooling
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the repository
COPY . .

# Prebuild dependencies to leverage Docker cache
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked

# Build the Rust workspace (may take a while; caching helps in subsequent builds)
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Create a Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

# Build the Python bindings (32-bit Polars runtime) into /wheel
RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && /workspace/.venv/bin/maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheel --release"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Install minimal runtime dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl1.1 zlib1g liblz4-1 ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels from the builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Default command to verify import
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Polars Python bindings - multi-stage build
# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and maturin-based Python bindings
FROM rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy manifests first for better cache behavior
COPY Cargo.lock Cargo.toml ./

# Resolve dependencies
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the Rust workspace (all features to ensure bindings)
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Create a Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

# Build the Python bindings for 64-bit Polars runtime into /wheel
RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && maturin build -m runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheel --release"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Do not install extra system libraries to minimize ABI risk; rely on wheel-provided deps

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Minimal test to verify import
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input: {"path": "py-polars/py-polars"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "# Polars Python bindings - multi-stage build
# Stage 1: Build Rust crates and maturin-based Python bindings
FROM rust:1.74-bullseye AS builder

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
  python3 python3-venv python3-dev python3-pip git ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /workspace

# Copy the full repository
COPY . .

# Resolve dependencies and build Rust workspace
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Create Python virtual environment and install maturin
RUN python3 -m venv /workspace/.venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="${VIRTUAL_ENV}/bin:${PATH}"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

# Build the Python bindings for 64-bit Polars runtime into /wheel
RUN bash -lc "cd py-polars && maturin build -m runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheel --release"

# Stage 2: Runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Minimal runtime dependencies (OpenSSL 1.1 stack for bullseye)
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  libssl1.1 zlib1g liblz4-1 ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy built wheels from builder
COPY --from=builder /wheel /wheel

# Install the built wheel
RUN python -m pip install --no-deps /wheel/*.whl

# Verify import at startup
CMD ["python3", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

iterations.injected_lessons:
1. **Base image declaration failure**  
   - **What happened:** Step 1 used `FROM --platform=$TARGETPLATFORM ...` which Docker treated as an invalid image name (`base image not found on Docker Hub`).  
   - **Fix:** Remove `--platform` from the `FROM` line or use a concrete image tag like `FROM rust:1.74-bullseye` or `FROM --platform=linux/amd64 rust:1.74-bullseye` *only* if the build environment supports multi‑arch builds.

2. **Missing `maturin` binary**  
   - **What happened:** Build failed with `bash: line 1: maturin: command not found (exit code 127)`.  
   - **Fix:** Explicitly install it in the builder stage, e.g.  
     ```bash
     RUN pip install --no-cache-dir maturin
     ```  
     before running any `maturin build` or `maturin develop` command.

3. **ABI incompatibility between Python versions**  
   - **What happened:** The builder image had system Python 3.11 while the runtime used `python:3.12-slim`; wheels from maturin were not loadable because of version mismatch.  
   - **Fix:** Use the *same* Python version in both stages—e.g. use `FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime` and add a build‑time Python 3.12 interpreter (e.g. `python3.12`, `python3.12‑dev`) in the builder.

4. **Missing Python headers during wheel build**  
   - **What happened:** Build failed with diagnostic “builder stage does not install python3‑dev”.  
   - **Fix:** In builder, install `python3-dev` (or `python3.12-dev`) plus `python3-pip` so maturin can compile C extensions:  
     ```bash
     RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3.12-dev python3-pip
     ```

5. **Architecture mismatch (32‑bit vs 64‑bit runtime)**  
   - **What happened:** The build selected `polars-runtime-32` but the final Python image is 64‑bit, triggering “ABI mismatch” warnings.  
   - **Fix:** Use the 64‑bit crate (`py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64`) as the build target. Set the correct `--target` or ensure Cargo defaults to 64‑bit on `linux/amd64`.

6. **Cross‑Debian incompatibility**  
   - **What happened:** Bullseye builder → Bookworm runtime produced rejected builds (“ABI incompatibility”).  
   - **Fix:** Keep Debian release consistent, e.g. `rust:1.74-bullseye` + `python:3.12-slim-bullseye`.

7. **Context and runtime issues**  
   - **What happened:** Missing `.dockerignore` in earlier runs caused slow context uploads; default `CMD` opened a Python REPL without smoke test.  
   - **Fix:** Keep `.dockerignore` to exclude `target`, `.venv`, etc.  Add `CMD ["python","-c","import polars; print(polars.__version__)"]` for basic validation.

These corrections should produce a successful multistage build of 64‑bit Polars Python bindings with consistent Debian Bullseye and Python 3.12 environments.

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install build-time dependencies including Python tooling for maturin
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      python3 python3-venv python3-pip git python3-dev && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository and build the Rust workspace
COPY . .

# Pre-build steps to fetch and compile crates
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Set up Python virtual environment and maturin for Python bindings
RUN python3 -m venv .venv
ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"
RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip install maturin

# Build and install the Python Polars bindings (32-bit runtime)
RUN maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image using a lightweight Python 3.12 environment
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Install runtime system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      git && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /opt/polars/.venv

ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/polars/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

# Basic smoke test on container startup to verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install build-time dependencies including Python tooling for maturin
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      python3 python3-venv python3-pip git && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Attempt to install Python 3.12 for ABI consistency with runtime
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends python3.12 python3.12-venv python3.12-dev || true && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository and build the Rust workspace
COPY . .

# Pre-build steps to fetch and compile crates
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Set up Python virtual environment with Python 3.12 if available, otherwise fall back to default python3
ARG PY_INTERNAL_PY=${PYTHON3_12:-0}
RUN if command -v python3.12 >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
        python3.12 -m venv .venv; \
        VENV_PY=python3.12; \
    else \
        python3 -m venv .venv; \
        VENV_PY=python3; \
    fi; \
    /bin/bash -lc ". /workspace/.venv/bin/activate; pip install --upgrade pip"

ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/workspace/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

# Ensure maturin is installed in the venv
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /workspace/.venv/bin/activate; pip install maturin"

# Build and install the Python Polars bindings (32-bit runtime)
RUN /bin/bash -lc ". /workspace/.venv/bin/activate; maturin develop -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-32/Cargo.toml"

# Final runtime image using a lightweight Python 3.12 environment
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Install runtime system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      git && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the Python virtual environment built in the builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/.venv /opt/polars/.venv

ENV VIRTUAL_ENV=/opt/polars/.venv
ENV PATH="$VIRTUAL_ENV/bin:$PATH"

# Basic smoke test on container startup to verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install build-time dependencies including Python tooling for maturin
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      python3 python3-venv python3-pip python3-dev git ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository and build the Rust workspace
COPY . .

# Pre-build steps to fetch and compile crates
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Set up Python tooling for building bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
RUN python3 -m pip install maturin

# Build the Python Polars bindings (64-bit runtime)
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml

# Final runtime image with just Python and the built wheel
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

# Install runtime system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      git && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the Python wheel from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /workspace/target/wheels/*.whl /tmp/

RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python -m pip install /tmp/*.whl

# Basic smoke test on container startup to verify import
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM rust:1.94.0-trixie AS builder
WORKDIR /workspace

# Install build-time dependencies including Python tooling for maturin
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
      build-essential cmake pkg-config libssl-dev zlib1g-dev libbz2-dev liblz4-dev \
      python3 python3-pip git ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy the repository
COPY . .

# Build the Rust workspace (all-features to include optional crates)
RUN cargo update --workspace --locked
RUN cargo build --workspace --all-features --locked

# Install maturin for Python bindings
RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN pip3 install maturin

# Build Python bindings (polars-runtime-64) and output wheels to /wheels
RUN maturin build -m py-polars/runtime/polars-runtime-64/Cargo.toml --out-dir /wheels

# Final runtime image
FROM python:3.12-slim-bullseye AS runtime

RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Copy wheel from builder stage
COPY --from=builder /wheels/*.whl /tmp/

RUN python -m pip install --upgrade pip
RUN python -m pip install /tmp/*.whl

# Smoke test on startup
CMD ["python", "-c", "import polars as pl; print(pl.__version__)" ]
"}
